requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency for LED Lamps and Luminaires (SREDA / BSTI Minimum Performance)
requirement_topic.zh: LED 灯及灯具能效要求（SREDA / BSTI 最低性能）
requirement_topic.zht: LED 燈及燈具能效要求（SREDA / BSTI 最低性能）

summary.en: In Bangladesh, energy efficiency of lighting products is driven by SREDA (Sustainable and Renewable Energy Development Authority) under the Energy Efficiency and Conservation (EE&C) framework, working with BSTI on standards. Bangladesh adopts IEC-based BDS performance standards for LED lamps (BDS/IEC 62612 for self-ballasted LED lamps performance) and luminaires. Where a minimum energy performance standard (MEPS) or star-rating applies to a lighting category, products must meet the declared efficacy (lm/W) and performance thresholds before they can carry the relevant rating. Unlike the EU Ecodesign Regulation, Bangladesh does not operate a single horizontal ecodesign regulation fixing binding minimum efficacy, CRI, lifetime, and power-factor values across all light sources; requirements are set per product category through BDS adoption and SREDA notifications, and the exporter should confirm the current MEPS/labelling scope for the specific lamp or luminaire type with BSTI and SREDA.
summary.zh: 在孟加拉国，照明产品能效由 SREDA（可持续与可再生能源发展署）在能效与节能（EE&C）框架下推动，并与 BSTI 在标准方面协作。孟加拉国对 LED 灯采用基于 IEC 的 BDS 性能标准（自镇流 LED 灯性能采用 BDS/IEC 62612）及灯具标准。当某照明类别适用最低能效标准（MEPS）或星级标识时，产品须达到所声明的光效（lm/W）及性能阈值，方可标注相应等级。与欧盟生态设计法规不同，孟加拉国并未实行一项横向生态设计法规对所有光源统一设定具约束力的最低光效、显色指数、寿命及功率因数数值；要求通过 BDS 采用及 SREDA 公告按产品类别设定，出口商应就具体灯或灯具类型向 BSTI 及 SREDA 确认现行 MEPS/标签适用范围。
summary.zht: 在孟加拉，照明產品能效由 SREDA（可持續與可再生能源發展署）在能效與節能（EE&C）框架下推動，並與 BSTI 在標準方面協作。孟加拉對 LED 燈採用基於 IEC 的 BDS 性能標準（自鎮流 LED 燈性能採用 BDS/IEC 62612）及燈具標準。當某照明類別適用最低能效標準（MEPS）或星級標識時，產品須達到所聲明的光效（lm/W）及性能閾值，方可標註相應等級。與歐盟生態設計法規不同，孟加拉並未實行一項橫向生態設計法規對所有光源統一設定具約束力的最低光效、顯色指數、壽命及功率因數數值；要求通過 BDS 採用及 SREDA 公告按產品類別設定，出口商應就具體燈或燈具類型向 BSTI 及 SREDA 確認現行 MEPS/標籤適用範圍。

standards_or_laws: Energy Efficiency and Conservation (EE&C) framework — administered by SREDA (Sustainable and Renewable Energy Development Authority), Bangladesh
BDS/IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (adopted as Bangladesh Standard)

summary.en: China's baseline is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), which defines three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest) ≥90 lm/W; Grade 2 ≥80 lm/W; Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W. Grade 3 is the minimum required for market entry in China. The China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and is administered by SAMR. GB 30255 sets absolute lm/W thresholds and does not comprehensively bind CRI minimums, lifetime, or power factor in a single horizontal regulation.
summary.zh: 中国基线为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）≥90 lm/W；2 级 ≥80 lm/W；3 级 ≥70 lm/W。3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 设定绝对 lm/W 阈值，未在单一横向法规中全面约束最低显色指数、寿命或功率因数。
summary.zht: 中國基線為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）≥90 lm/W；2 級 ≥80 lm/W；3 級 ≥70 lm/W。3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 設定絕對 lm/W 閾值，未在單一橫向法規中全面約束最低顯色指數、壽命或功率因數。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR

gap.en: China's GB 30255 grades are not recognised in Bangladesh, and a Chinese CEL grade does not determine any Bangladesh rating. For Bangladesh, the exporter must (1) confirm whether the specific lamp/luminaire category falls under a SREDA MEPS or star-rating scheme and, if so, meet the declared efficacy and performance thresholds; (2) ensure performance evidence is produced against the BDS/IEC performance standard (e.g., BDS/IEC 62612 for self-ballasted LED lamps) rather than GB 30255; and (3) recognise that Bangladesh applies category-specific BDS/SREDA requirements rather than a single binding ecodesign regulation, so CRI, lifetime, and power-factor expectations should be checked per category. A product meeting only CN Grade 3 may or may not satisfy a Bangladesh efficacy threshold depending on the applicable BDS/SREDA notification — verify the current requirement before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国 GB 30255 等级在孟加拉国不被认可，中国 CEL 等级不能决定任何孟加拉国评级。对于孟加拉国，出口商须：（1）确认具体灯/灯具类别是否属于 SREDA 的 MEPS 或星级标识方案，如属于，则达到所声明的光效及性能阈值；（2）确保性能证据依据 BDS/IEC 性能标准（如自镇流 LED 灯的 BDS/IEC 62612）而非 GB 30255 出具；（3）认识到孟加拉国按类别适用 BDS/SREDA 要求而非单一具约束力的生态设计法规，因此应按类别核查显色指数、寿命及功率因数预期。仅达到中国 3 级的产品是否满足孟加拉国某项光效阈值，取决于适用的 BDS/SREDA 公告——出货前请核实现行要求。
gap.zht: 中國 GB 30255 等級在孟加拉不被認可，中國 CEL 等級不能決定任何孟加拉評級。對於孟加拉，出口商須：（1）確認具體燈/燈具類別是否屬於 SREDA 的 MEPS 或星級標識方案，如屬於，則達到所聲明的光效及性能閾值；（2）確保性能證據依據 BDS/IEC 性能標準（如自鎮流 LED 燈的 BDS/IEC 62612）而非 GB 30255 出具；（3）認識到孟加拉按類別適用 BDS/SREDA 要求而非單一具約束力的生態設計法規，因此應按類別核查顯色指數、壽命及功率因數預期。僅達到中國 3 級的產品是否滿足孟加拉某項光效閾值，取決於適用的 BDS/SREDA 公告——出貨前請核實現行要求。

mandatory_status.target: Category-dependent — energy performance and labelling obligations apply where the lighting category is covered by a SREDA MEPS/star-rating scheme and the corresponding BDS/IEC performance standard; confirm current scope with BSTI/SREDA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: Sustainable and Renewable Energy Development Authority (SREDA), Government of Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bangladesh does not operate a single EU-style horizontal ecodesign regulation; energy efficiency for LED lighting is handled through SREDA's EE&C framework and category-specific BDS/IEC performance standards (e.g., BDS/IEC 62612). A Chinese GB 30255 grade and China Energy Label registration are not recognised in Bangladesh. Confirm with BSTI and SREDA whether the specific lamp/luminaire is in a MEPS or star-rating scheme and produce performance evidence against the applicable BDS/IEC standard before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国未实行单一欧盟式横向生态设计法规；LED 照明能效通过 SREDA 的 EE&C 框架及类别特定的 BDS/IEC 性能标准（如 BDS/IEC 62612）处理。中国 GB 30255 等级及中国能效标识注册在孟加拉国不被认可。出货前请向 BSTI 及 SREDA 确认具体灯/灯具是否属于 MEPS 或星级标识方案，并依据适用的 BDS/IEC 标准出具性能证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉未實行單一歐盟式橫向生態設計法規；LED 照明能效通過 SREDA 的 EE&C 框架及類別特定的 BDS/IEC 性能標準（如 BDS/IEC 62612）處理。中國 GB 30255 等級及中國能效標識注冊在孟加拉不被認可。出貨前請向 BSTI 及 SREDA 確認具體燈/燈具是否屬於 MEPS 或星級標識方案，並依據適用的 BDS/IEC 標準出具性能證據。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling / Star Rating for Lighting (SREDA) vs China Energy Label
requirement_topic.zh: 照明能源标签 / 星级标识（SREDA）与中国能效标识对比
requirement_topic.zht: 照明能源標籤 / 星級標識（SREDA）與中國能效標識對比

summary.en: SREDA, under the Energy Efficiency and Conservation Master Plan, operates an energy labelling / star-rating programme for selected energy-consuming appliances and equipment in Bangladesh, with lighting among the priority categories targeted for efficiency standards and labelling. Where a star-rating or energy label applies to a lighting product, the product must be tested against the corresponding BDS/IEC performance standard and registered/declared so the appropriate label can be displayed. There is no single EU-EPREL-style central product registry mandated across all light sources; the labelling obligation is category-specific and administered via SREDA in coordination with BSTI. Exporters should confirm whether the specific LED lamp/luminaire is currently in scope of a SREDA label or star-rating before market placement.
summary.zh: SREDA 在《能效与节能总体规划》下，对孟加拉国部分耗能电器与设备实施能源标签 / 星级标识计划，照明属于优先纳入能效标准及标签的类别之一。当星级标识或能源标签适用于某照明产品时，该产品须依据相应的 BDS/IEC 性能标准检测并完成注册/声明，方可标注相应标签。孟加拉国并无对所有光源统一强制的欧盟 EPREL 式中央产品注册系统；标签义务按类别设定，由 SREDA 与 BSTI 协调管理。出口商在投放市场前应确认具体 LED 灯/灯具是否当前属于 SREDA 标签或星级标识适用范围。
summary.zht: SREDA 在《能效與節能總體規劃》下，對孟加拉部分耗能電器與設備實施能源標籤 / 星級標識計劃，照明屬於優先納入能效標準及標籤的類別之一。當星級標識或能源標籤適用於某照明產品時，該產品須依據相應的 BDS/IEC 性能標準檢測並完成注冊/聲明，方可標註相應標籤。孟加拉並無對所有光源統一強制的歐盟 EPREL 式中央產品注冊系統；標籤義務按類別設定，由 SREDA 與 BSTI 協調管理。出口商在投放市場前應確認具體 LED 燈/燈具是否當前屬於 SREDA 標籤或星級標識適用範圍。

standards_or_laws: SREDA Energy Efficiency and Conservation Master Plan — energy labelling / star-rating programme (Bangladesh)
BDS/IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps performance (test basis for labelling)

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 is mandatory for LED room luminaires. Products must be registered (via the SAMR-administered CEL scheme) before affixing the CEL, which shows Grade 1-3 based on absolute lm/W thresholds. The CEL is the baseline Chinese labelling instrument and there is no mutual recognition between the China Energy Label and any Bangladesh SREDA label or star-rating.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255-2019 对 LED 室内照明产品实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL）。产品须在贴附 CEL 前完成注册（通过 SAMR 管理的 CEL 制度），CEL 依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示 1-3 级。CEL 是中国的基线标签工具，中国能效标识与任何孟加拉国 SREDA 标签或星级标识之间不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255-2019 對 LED 室內照明產品實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL）。產品須在貼附 CEL 前完成注冊（通過 SAMR 管理的 CEL 制度），CEL 依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示 1-3 級。CEL 是中國的基線標籤工具，中國能效標識與任何孟加拉 SREDA 標籤或星級標識之間不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR

gap.en: The China Energy Label is not recognised in Bangladesh and cannot be reused; a Bangladesh SREDA label/star-rating (where applicable) must be obtained separately. Key differences: (1) the CN grade uses absolute lm/W thresholds via the SAMR CEL registry, whereas Bangladesh labelling is category-specific under SREDA and is not a single horizontal EPREL-style registry; (2) the exporter must verify whether the specific LED product type is currently in scope of a SREDA label or star-rating, since not all lighting categories are necessarily covered at a given time; (3) where in scope, testing must be to the applicable BDS/IEC performance standard, not GB 30255. Because Bangladesh has no EU-style horizontal energy-labelling regulation, the practical step is to confirm the current SREDA scope and procedure with the in-country importer rather than assume an automatic labelling obligation.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识在孟加拉国不被认可且不可重复使用；如适用，须另行取得孟加拉国 SREDA 标签/星级标识。主要差异：（1）中国等级通过 SAMR 的 CEL 注册系统采用绝对 lm/W 阈值，而孟加拉国标签按类别由 SREDA 设定，并非单一横向的 EPREL 式注册系统；（2）出口商须核实具体 LED 产品类型当前是否属于 SREDA 标签或星级标识适用范围，因为并非所有照明类别在某一时点都必然被涵盖；（3）在适用范围内时，检测须依据适用的 BDS/IEC 性能标准，而非 GB 30255。由于孟加拉国没有欧盟式横向能源标签法规，实际步骤是与在地进口商确认现行 SREDA 适用范围及程序，而非假定存在自动标签义务。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識在孟加拉不被認可且不可重複使用；如適用，須另行取得孟加拉 SREDA 標籤/星級標識。主要差異：（1）中國等級通過 SAMR 的 CEL 注冊系統採用絕對 lm/W 閾值，而孟加拉標籤按類別由 SREDA 設定，並非單一橫向的 EPREL 式注冊系統；（2）出口商須核實具體 LED 產品類型當前是否屬於 SREDA 標籤或星級標識適用範圍，因為並非所有照明類別在某一時點都必然被涵蓋；（3）在適用範圍內時，檢測須依據適用的 BDS/IEC 性能標準，而非 GB 30255。由於孟加拉沒有歐盟式橫向能源標籤法規，實際步驟是與在地進口商確認現行 SREDA 適用範圍及程序，而非假定存在自動標籤義務。

mandatory_status.target: Category-dependent — SREDA energy labelling / star-rating applies where the lighting category is in scope; confirm current SREDA scope and procedure for the specific product before market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration required before affixing CEL under GB 30255-2019

source.publisher: Sustainable and Renewable Energy Development Authority (SREDA), Government of Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bangladesh energy labelling for lighting is administered by SREDA on a category-specific basis and is not a single EU-EPREL-style horizontal registry. A Chinese China Energy Label does not substitute for any Bangladesh SREDA label or star-rating. Exporters should confirm with SREDA and the in-country importer whether the specific LED product is currently in label/star-rating scope, and produce test evidence against the applicable BDS/IEC standard rather than GB 30255.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国的照明能源标签由 SREDA 按类别管理，并非单一的欧盟 EPREL 式横向注册系统。中国能效标识不可替代任何孟加拉国 SREDA 标签或星级标识。出口商应向 SREDA 及在地进口商确认具体 LED 产品当前是否属于标签/星级标识适用范围，并依据适用的 BDS/IEC 标准（而非 GB 30255）出具检测证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉的照明能源標籤由 SREDA 按類別管理，並非單一的歐盟 EPREL 式橫向注冊系統。中國能效標識不可替代任何孟加拉 SREDA 標籤或星級標識。出口商應向 SREDA 及在地進口商確認具體 LED 產品當前是否屬於標籤/星級標識適用範圍，並依據適用的 BDS/IEC 標準（而非 GB 30255）出具檢測證據。
